DP.177.0000:
Yo, Trainer!\f
You had me counting the days on my
fingers waiting for you to come.\f
I heard from Volkner what you 
did in Sunyshore.\f
You managed to light a fire in that
guy’s heart again.\f
How could you not expect me to look
forward to seeing you in battle?\f
DP.177.0001:
You’re facing a Fire-type Pokémon
user with me.\f
Let Flint see how hot your spirit
burns!\f
DP.177.0004:
I was waiting for you, challenger!\f
Flint, the master of the Fire type,
is up next!\f
Battles are clashes of the burning
spirit of Pokémon.\f
Battles aren’t about appearances,
or what’s weak or strong.\f
It all comes down to whether the
combatants can burn hot and bright\r
or not.\f
DP.177.0006:
...
...\f
...Keep going...\f
I know your spirit burns hot and
bright. Your whole team does.
